## Required Validation Checklist

Verify that all required checks pass locally before requesting review:

- [ ] `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build:web`
- [ ] `pnpm build:api`

## Security & Privacy Audit

- [ ] Verified no secrets, `.env` values, or API keys are exposed or committed.
- [ ] Verified server-side environment variables are not exposed to client components.
